result:
I'd eliminate misinformation and bias from all human cognition and communication—making everyone (and every AI) inherently truth-seeking, curious, and able to reason clearly without ego or agenda getting in the way. 

Why? Wars, suffering, and stagnation often stem from distorted perceptions of reality. With perfect clarity, we'd solve problems faster, collaborate better, and actually understand the universe. (Plus, imagine the memes we'd make.)

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
